title: stegnogramma himalaica
intro: Stegnogramma himalaica, also known as Himalayan bristle fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Stegnogramma himalaica is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiviral agent. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
